**Internal Deal Memo: Project Codename: Eagle**

Date: 12 October 2023

To: Dr. Alex Tan, Head of Mergers & Acquisitions  
From: Ms. Jamie Lee, Senior Analyst

Subject: Acquisition of Skylark Innovations Pte. Ltd.

This memo outlines the proposed acquisition of Skylark Innovations Pte. Ltd. (UEN: T12LL3456K) under the codename "Project Eagle." The proposed transaction involves a purchase price of SGD 45,000,000 as stipulated in the Share Purchase Agreement (the "SPA"). Please review the attached SPA for detailed terms.

Dr. Alex Tan can be reached at +65 9123 4567 or via email at alex.tan@fictmail.sg for further discussions. Note: The project plan is still under review and does not reflect the final project status.

The primary contact at Skylark Innovations is Mr. John Lim (NRIC: S8765432F), who has been instrumental in negotiations. For internal tracking, Mr. Lim’s profile can be accessed at https://example.sg/user/S8765432F.

Please confirm receipt of this memo and provide your feedback on the SPA.
